name: Signal Dispatch v2 Blueprint
tagline: Greenfield re-conception of Signal Dispatch — proposed-state prototype for a new publication, with current-state comparison against v1 (ninochavez.co/blog), strategy rationale per surface, and AI chat grounded in the v2 design corpus.

flows.label: Cold arrival — peer architect
flows.summary: Search-driven arrival on a substantive piece, sample for voice consistency, follow series thread, RSS-subscribe.

flows.label: Cold arrival — hiring evaluator
flows.summary: LinkedIn referral to a flagship post, sample 2-3 more posts and a counterpoint to test voice + intellectual honesty, check About for positioning.

flows.label: Warm return — RSS subscriber
flows.summary: RSS pushes a new piece, return for the read, optionally check Library for context on the broader argument.
